title: Construct Target Array With Multiple Sums
description: Implement LeetCode 1354, Construct Target Array With Multiple Sums. The method must follow the stated parameter order and return the exact deterministic result. Inputs use Python values; callers need not preserve mutable inputs unless the original problem explicitly requires it. This pack paraphrases the public task and does not include platform hidden tests.
input_contract: Parameters in order: target. Inputs satisfy the public LeetCode constraints for this problem.
output_contract: Return a JSON-serializable bool using exact comparison; list order is significant where the original problem defines an ordered result.
